governing_documents.description: BUILD / REVIEW / SUMMARISE / IDLE mode governance. Post-compaction rules. Controlled execution over helpful autonomy.

governing_documents.name: Implementation Plan Protocol
governing_documents.description: Required format, phase status icons, mandatory sections. Every project with 3+ phases must have an implementation plan.

priority_actions.detail: All 8 phases done, 6 features live, 22 staff onboarded (29 Jan). Full data audit completed: 28 class records corrected, 5 TEST records cleaned up. Remaining: monitor staff feedback, Feb Camp instructor assignment when staffed.

priority_actions.action: Staff Costs — Monitor Timesheet Usage via Portal
priority_actions.detail: Portal live to all staff (29 Jan). Monitor that staff log sessions via portal timesheet form, then verify n8n statement generation works with portal-created records.

priority_actions.action: Lead Scoring: Full historical backfill + attribution fixes (R1-R4)
priority_actions.detail: 14-day sync done (75 records). Remaining: run --all --execute in background (20-30 min). Then R1: add utm_content to Google Ads (10 min), R3: fix Meta misattribution in n8n (30 min), R4: default organic source (1 hr).

priority_actions.action: Children's Onboarding GHL v2.0 - Phase 1 In Progress (4/10 kit pages)
priority_actions.detail: Phase 0 complete (backup done). 4 kit pages built: Ballet (9 levels), Tap, Hip Hop, Gymnastics. Remaining: Jazz/Contemporary/Elite need shop products; Drama/Broadway/First Mouves need 'no uniform' pages; then upload to WordPress.

priority_actions.action: Financial Intelligence — FIN-01 Core Live, Phase 2 Next
priority_actions.detail: FIN-01 workflow live (16 nodes, Sat 07:00). Xero P&L + Bank Health + 4 Stripe accounts + Reconciliation Engine + Cash Health. Found: Xero understates revenue by ~20%. Next: Add Airtable queries, GitHub push, then build financial dashboard (MVP 10 numbers).

priority_actions.action: Financial Health Check — Travel split with Louise + 4 Dec queries
priority_actions.detail: Year-end unblocked (7/8 statements sent, accountant papers received). Remaining: categorise £32.6K travel with Louise, answer 4 Dec queries (3× Amazon, 1× Anouska), resolve 4838 statement issue.

priority_actions.action: 12-Month Budget — Upload Corrected Spreadsheet to Google Sheets
priority_actions.detail: Venue rental corrected: £22,997→£32,227 (+40%). SMSJ invoices + price increase (Jan 2026) applied. Tab 2 shows accrual (when sessions happen), Tab 5 shows cash flow (termly lumps). Contribution margin now 78.4%. Next: upload .xlsx to Google Sheets, create assumptions register, write 1-page summary.

5/5 cleanup tasks done. opportunity_abandoned tag added to Abandoned workflow + Follow Ups If/Else updated (29 Jan). Measure SMS on 1 Mar vs 2,668 baseline (target ~2,250). See UNIT-ECONOMICS-REFERENCE.md Section 14.

New strategic project: consolidate all existing financial/operational data into single diagnostic, then evaluate 3 growth paths (scale, franchise, DSIAB). Phase 1 is Claude-led (no Rob input needed). Phase 2 needs Rob/Louise questionnaire (~60-90 min). DSP Unit Economics reference doc created (29 Jan).
Establish SOP update process and quarterly review cycle
